title: Install Azure preconfigured dashboards and alerts

blocks.content:
In this milestone, you'll install preconfigured dashboards and alerts that display the Azure metrics collected by Cloud Provider Observability.

Cloud Provider Observability can deploy dashboards and alerts for many Azure services you're monitoring, providing immediate insights into resource utilization, performance trends, and operational health.

To install preconfigured dashboards and alerts, complete the following steps:
In Grafana Cloud, click **Observability > Cloud provider > Azure** in the main menu.
Scroll down to the **Dashboards and Alerts Installation** section.
Click **Install** to install pre-built dashboards and alert rules for all discovered Azure services.

Preconfigured dashboards provide service-specific views for Azure resources such as Virtual Machines, Storage Accounts, and Load Balancers.

Preconfigured alerts notify you about critical conditions such as high CPU usage, storage capacity limits, and service availability issues.
